home.title: Domain Hunt
home.signInToSubmitDescription: You need to sign in to submit domains to the hunt. Join the community and share your favorite domains!

mine.title: My Activity
mine.signInTitle: Sign in to view your activity
mine.signInDescription: Please sign in to see your submitted domains and voting history

list.empty: No more domains, please try again later.

validation.singleLevel: Domain name must be a single level domain (e.g. example.com) or higher (e.g. sub.example.com)

vote.removeError: Failed to remove vote. Please try again.
vote.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove your vote for "{domainName}"?

awards.title: Awards
awards.empty: No awards yet. Keep voting to help this domain win!

submitted.empty: You haven't submitted any domains yet.

upvoted.loadError: Failed to load your upvoted domains
upvoted.empty: You haven't upvoted any domains yet.

campaign.loadErrorDescription: Failed to load campaign domains. Please try again later.
campaign.emptyDescription: No domains are available for this campaign.
campaign.nominatePrompt: Why isn't my favourite domain here?
campaign.votingClosedThanks: Thank you for voting - winners will receive an email with subdomain claim details.

whyVote.title: Why Vote?
whyVote.priorityClaimDescription: First dibs on new subdomains (while supplies last)
whyVote.weeklyNfscDescription: Weekly raffle to earn $NFSC for upvoter
whyVote.launchDescription: The [name].cv with highest votes launches subdomain issuance

community.joinDescription: Connect with fellow hunters - vote together on upcoming domains.
community.shareDescription: Invite your friends - earn one raffle entry for every vote.

share.descriptionDomainTracked: Share this domain on Twitter/X to help others discover it and earn rewards.

share.prefilledHint: Opens Twitter/X with a pre-filled post for {target}
share.postUrlHint: Paste the URL of your tweet after sharing to earn rewards
share.invalidPostUrl: Please enter a valid Twitter/X post URL
share.recordError: Failed to record your share. Please try again.
share.checkPostUrl: Please check the post URL and try again.
